hooks.command: bash -c 'case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" in */docs/progress/sessions/*.md) cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" && bash scripts/build-log-index.sh ;; esac'

bash -c 'case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" in */docs/plans/completed/*) echo "[HOOK WARN] Editing a file in docs/plans/completed/. Completed plans are read-only. Provide an explicit documentation-correction reason in your session log if this is intentional." >&2 ;; esac'
bash -c 'case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" in */output/*.md) cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" && bash scripts/agent/run-completion-hook.sh "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" ;; esac'
